cta.title: DON'T MISS OUT
cta.subtitle: Register now to secure your spot

about.hero_lead: Peja Outdoor Festival celebrates everything that makes western Kosovo unforgettable — its peaks, its people, its food, and the sound of a community that knows how to gather.
about.intro_title: A festival that wears the city, not the other way around.
about.intro_p1: Hike at sunrise, taste local plates at lunch, build something with your hands in the afternoon, then dance under the stars. That's the rhythm. Show up — the rest follows.
about.intro_p2: We started Peja Outdoor as a small gathering between friends and local artists. It grew because the city did the heavy lifting: the streets, the valley, the people who keep showing up year after year.
about.outro_title: Come for a day. Stay for four.
about.outro_subtitle: Registration is free. Spots are limited per activity.
about.stat_days_label: Days, from sunrise to late night
about.pillar_nature_body: Rugel Valley, Rugova canyon, peaks of the Accursed Mountains — Peja sits where alpine meets Balkan.
about.pillar_sound_body: Local and international acts across multiple stages, day and night, indoors and under open sky.
about.pillar_workshops_body: Hands-on sessions in food, art, traditional craft, wellness and adventure — pick what speaks to you.
about.pillar_community_body: Built by locals, open to the world. A meeting point for travelers, artists and the city of Peja itself.

register.liability_body: I accept full responsibility for any injuries or accidents during festival activities. I participate at my own risk and will not hold organizers liable.
register.commitment_body: I commit to showing up for the activities I've registered for. Spots are limited and my no-show prevents others from joining.
